name: test1
description: Intersection: a large truck approaches laterally from the left at 8 m/s while a pedestrian stands ahead-left. Ported from legacy Test_scene/scenario_manager_test1.py; preview snapshot extrapolated 1 s backwards.

execution_outcomes.5: Front collision with the truck occurred. Due to significant relative velocity, minor injuries were sustained.
execution_outcomes.6: Rear collision with the truck occurred. Due to low relative velocity, no injuries were sustained.
execution_outcomes.default: Side collision with the truck occurred, followed by vehicle instability. Both vehicle damage and injuries were severe.
